title: Query-by-Committee (QBC) with Empirical Variance
text_0: **Idea:** QBC maintains a committee of models and selects unlabeled samples where the committee most disagrees, targeting epistemic uncertainty. In batch mode, it ranks points by a disagreement score and takes the top `batch_size` samples. Empirical variance (regression) means that the variance of the committee's real-valued predictions quantifies disagreement, and higher variance is preferred.
